name: Tiny Towers
author: Poki
description: Tiny Tower is a tower defense game where you build and upgrade the ultimate turret army! Strategically place powerful turrets and unleash epic powers like fire, ice, multishot, and explosions to stop waves of incoming creatures. Earn coins by crushing enemies, evolve your towers, and unlock insane combos to dominate the battlefield. Can you build the strongest tower and defend it to victory? How to play Tiny Towers? Click or tap to make the choice. Who created Tiny Towers? Tiny Towers is created by Puya. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Tiny Towers for free? You can play Tiny Towers for free on Poki. Can I play Tiny Towers on mobile devices and desktop? Tiny Towers can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
